Cerebral Palsy - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS

1 - Claims met, not FFS

3 - Claims met and FFS
CERPAL_MEDICARE Cerebral Palsy - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
